map.title: Bengaluru - Honnavar Road, Tiptur Rural.
map.subtitle: Located on the outskirts of Tiptur, easily accessible from the Bengaluru-Honnavar highway with ample parking.

directions.label: By road
directions.value: On Bengaluru - Honnavar Road (NH206), Tiptur Rural area. Look for the green surroundings.

directions.label: Parking
directions.value: Good parking area available for both two-wheelers and cars.
